This code generates a summary file with median speeds from the orginal tracked cells, one median speed per well
````{r}
# ==== CONFIG ====
root_dir <- "../../../../../Alumni/Maria/Thesis/experiments/attachment/data/2026_02_04_random_migration/20260204/output/TrackMate_2026-04-04/TrackMate_2026-04-04/"   # <- change this to your main folder
out_xlsx <- file.path(root_dir, "median_track_speed_summary.xlsx")
out_csv  <- file.path(root_dir, "median_summary_all.csv")

# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(openxlsx)

# =======================
# HELPERS
# =======================

# Extract well like B02 from filenames like ECM_B02_C2_T1-13_tracks(.csv)
extract_well_B02 <- function(path) {
  base <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(path))
  m <- str_match(base, "(?i)(?:^|[^A-Za-z0-9])([A-H][0-9]{2})(?:[^A-Za-z0-9]|$)")
  if (is.na(m[1, 2])) return(NA_character_)
  toupper(m[1, 2])
}

# Detect delimiter by looking at the header line
detect_delim <- function(path) {
  header <- readLines(path, n = 1, warn = FALSE)
  header <- sub("^\ufeff", "", header)  # remove BOM if present
  counts <- c(
    comma = str_count(header, ","),
    semicolon = str_count(header, ";"),
    tab = str_count(header, "\t")
  )
  if (all(counts == 0)) return(",")
  if (which.max(counts) == 1) return(",")
  if (which.max(counts) == 2) return(";")
  "\t"
}

# Read TrackMate CSV robustly
read_trackmate <- function(path) {
  delim <- detect_delim(path)
  read_delim(
    file = path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    progress = FALSE,
    trim_ws = TRUE
  )
}

# =======================
# MAIN
# =======================

# Read ALL csv files recursively from root_dir and subfolders
csvs <- list.files(
  root_dir,
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

if (length(csvs) == 0) {
  stop("No CSV files found under root_dir (check path and extensions).")
}

results <- lapply(csvs, function(f) {
  well <- extract_well_B02(f)

  df <- tryCatch(read_trackmate(f), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(df)) {
    return(data.frame(
      Folder = basename(dirname(f)),
      Well = well,
      MedianSpeed = NA_real_,
      File = basename(f),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  if (!("TRACK_MEDIAN_SPEED" %in% names(df))) {
    return(data.frame(
      Folder = basename(dirname(f)),
      Well = well,
      MedianSpeed = NA_real_,
      File = basename(f),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  # Each CSV = one well; calculate one median value per file
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df$TRACK_MEDIAN_SPEED))
  med <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.infinite(med)) med <- NA_real_

  data.frame(
    Folder = basename(dirname(f)),
    Well = well,
    MedianSpeed = med,
    File = basename(f),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})

df_all <- bind_rows(results) %>%
  arrange(Well, File)

# Write CSV
write.csv(df_all, out_csv, row.names = FALSE)

# Write Excel
wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "summary")
writeData(wb, "summary", df_all)
saveWorkbook(wb, out_xlsx, overwrite = TRUE)

message("Done.")
message("CSV written to: ", out_csv)
message("XLSX written to: ", out_xlsx)
```

This code plots median speeds/well per condition
```{r}
# =======================
# LIBRARIES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# =======================
file <- "input_files/median_summary_all.csv"

df_all <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Speed_um_h = as.numeric(Speed_um_h),
    Draxin_nM   = as.numeric(Draxin_nM),
    Coating     = str_trim(as.character(Coating)),
    Coating     = factor(Coating)
  )

# =======================
# OUTPUT DIR
# =======================
out_dir <- "output/single_cell"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# FACTOR LEVELS
# =======================
coating_levels <- c("Ctrl", "ECM", "Fibronectin", "PolyD", "17nM", "140nM")
draxin_levels  <- c(0, 17, 140)

# =======================
# COMMON Y-AXIS RANGE
# =======================
df_used <- df_all %>%
  filter(Coating %in% coating_levels, Draxin_nM %in% draxin_levels)

ylims <- range(df_used$Speed_um_h, na.rm = TRUE)
pad <- 0.05 * diff(ylims)
ylims <- c(ylims[1] - pad, ylims[2] + pad)

# =======================
# PLOT 1:
# Coating effect at Draxin = 0
# =======================
p1 <- df_all %>%
  filter(Draxin_nM == 0, Coating %in% coating_levels) %>%
  mutate(Coating = factor(Coating, levels = coating_levels)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Coating, y = Speed_um_h)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.15), alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
  labs(
    title = "Median speed by coating (Draxin = 0 nM)",
    x = "Coating",
    y = "Median track speed"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

print(p1)
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "plot1_coating_effect_draxin0.png"),
  p1, width = 8, height = 4.5, dpi = 300
)

# =======================
# PLOT 2A:
# Draxin effect on Ctrl only
# =======================
p2a <- df_all %>%
  filter(Coating == "Ctrl", Draxin_nM %in% draxin_levels) %>%
  mutate(Draxin_nM = factor(Draxin_nM, levels = draxin_levels)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Draxin_nM, y = Speed_um_h)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.15), alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
  labs(
    title = "Draxin effect on median speed (Ctrl coating)",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Median track speed"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

print(p2a)
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "plot2a_draxin_effect_ctrl.png"),
  p2a, width = 6.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300
)

# =======================
# PLOT 2B:
# Draxin effect within each coating
# =======================
p2b <- df_all %>%
  filter(Coating %in% coating_levels, Draxin_nM %in% draxin_levels) %>%
  mutate(
    Coating   = factor(Coating, levels = coating_levels),
    Draxin_nM = factor(Draxin_nM, levels = draxin_levels)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Draxin_nM, y = Speed_um_h)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.15), alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ Coating, nrow = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
  labs(
    title = "Draxin × coating",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Median track speed"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

print(p2b)
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "plot2b_rescue_facet_by_coating.png"),
  p2b, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300
)
```

This code calculates stats
```{r}
# =======================
# LIBRARIES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(stringr)

# =======================
# HELPERS
# =======================
eta2_from_anova <- function(aov_tab) {
  ss <- aov_tab[["Sum Sq"]]
  terms <- rownames(aov_tab)
  total_ss <- sum(ss, na.rm = TRUE)
  ss_res <- ss[length(ss)]  # residuals last

  data.frame(
    Term = terms,
    SS = ss,
    Eta2 = ss / total_ss,
    Partial_Eta2 = ss / (ss + ss_res)
  )
}

# =======================
# READ DATA
# =======================
file <- "input_files/median_summary_all.csv"

df_all <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Speed_um_h = as.numeric(Speed_um_h),
    Draxin_nM  = as.numeric(Draxin_nM),
    Coating    = str_trim(as.character(Coating)),
    Coating    = factor(Coating)
  )

out_dir <- "output/single_cell/"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

coating_levels <- c("Ctrl", "ECM", "Fibronectin", "PolyD", "17nM", "140nM")
draxin_levels  <- c(0, 17, 140)

# =======================
# TEST 1:
# Coating effect at Draxin = 0
# only each coating vs Ctrl
# =======================
d1 <- df_all %>%
  filter(Draxin_nM == 0, Coating %in% coating_levels) %>%
  mutate(
    Coating = factor(Coating, levels = coating_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Speed_um_h))

m1 <- lm(Speed_um_h ~ Coating, data = d1)

sh1 <- shapiro.test(resid(m1))
lv1 <- car::leveneTest(Speed_um_h ~ Coating, data = d1)

a1  <- anova(m1)
es1 <- eta2_from_anova(a1)

emm1 <- emmeans(m1, ~ Coating)
ph1  <- contrast(emm1, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = "Ctrl", adjust = "dunnett")

write.csv(
  data.frame(
    statistic = unname(sh1$statistic),
    p.value = sh1$p.value,
    method = sh1$method
  ),
  file.path(out_dir, "test1_residual_shapiro.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(lv1),
  file.path(out_dir, "test1_levene.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(a1),
  file.path(out_dir, "test1_coating_ANOVA.csv"),
  row.names = TRUE
)

write.csv(
  es1,
  file.path(out_dir, "test1_coating_effectsizes_eta2.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(ph1),
  file.path(out_dir, "test1_coating_vs_ctrl.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# TEST 2:
# Draxin + Coating + Interaction
# =======================
d2 <- df_all %>%
  filter(Draxin_nM %in% draxin_levels, Coating %in% coating_levels) %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin  = factor(Draxin_nM, levels = draxin_levels),
    Coating = factor(Coating, levels = coating_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Speed_um_h))

m2 <- lm(Speed_um_h ~ Coating * Draxin, data = d2)

a2 <- car::Anova(m2, type = 2)

ss_res <- sum(resid(m2)^2)
es2 <- data.frame(
  Term = rownames(a2),
  SS = a2[["Sum Sq"]],
  Partial_Eta2 = a2[["Sum Sq"]] / (a2[["Sum Sq"]] + ss_res)
)

eemm_draxin_within_coating <- emmeans(m2, ~ Draxin | Coating)
ph_draxin_within_coating  <- contrast(
  emm_draxin_within_coating,
  method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
  ref = "0",
  adjust = "dunnett"
)

emm_coating_within_draxin <- emmeans(m2, ~ Coating | Draxin)
ph_coating_within_draxin  <- contrast(
  emm_coating_within_draxin,
  method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
  ref = "Ctrl",
  adjust = "dunnett"
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(a2),
  file.path(out_dir, "test2_draxin_coating_TypeII_ANOVA.csv"),
  row.names = TRUE
)

write.csv(
  es2,
  file.path(out_dir, "test2_effectsizes_partial_eta2.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(ph_draxin_within_coating),
  file.path(out_dir, "test2_posthoc_draxin_within_each_coating.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(ph_coating_within_draxin),
  file.path(out_dir, "test2_posthoc_coating_vs_ctrl_within_each_draxin.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# RESCUE / DIFFERENCE-IN-DIFFERENCES
# Compare (140 - 0) within each coating vs Ctrl
# =======================
emm <- emmeans(m2, ~ Draxin | Coating)

draxin_140_vs_0 <- contrast(
  emm,
  method = list("140-0" = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  by = "Coating"
)

draxin_effect_by_coating <- emmeans(draxin_140_vs_0, ~ Coating)

rescue_vs_ctrl <- contrast(
  draxin_effect_by_coating,
  method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
  ref = "Ctrl",
  adjust = "dunnett"
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(draxin_140_vs_0),
  file.path(out_dir, "test2_draxin_140minus0_within_each_coating.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(rescue_vs_ctrl),
  file.path(out_dir, "test2_rescue_vs_ctrl_140minus0.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

print("Done.")
```
